message:
feat(tui): add responsive breakpoint layouts and side detail panels to all screens

Migrate all TUI screens from manual width-based splits to ftui's
ResponsiveLayout with Breakpoint/Flex/Constraint primitives, and add
toggleable detail panels ('i' key) with scrollable key-value views
('J'/'K' keys) across every screen.

Agents screen (agents.rs):
- Replace manual width checks with ResponsiveLayout breakpoints (Lg: 60/40,
  Xl: 50/50 table/detail split)
- Add detail_visible toggle and detail_scroll offset fields
- New render_detail_panel() showing agent name, status with icon/color,
  program, model, last active (relative + ISO), message count, and
  message rate sparkline text bar
- Extract render_table_content() helper for the main table column
- Add build_detail_lines() to construct typed key-value rows with
  optional color overrides
- New sparkline_bar() renders VecDeque<f64> as Unicode block characters
- New render_kv_lines() generic helper for scrollable label:value rendering
  with scroll indicator
- Reset detail_scroll on selection change
- Add 'i' (toggle detail), 'J'/'K' (scroll detail) keybindings

Analytics screen (analytics.rs):
- Replace ANALYTICS_WIDE_SPLIT_MIN_WIDTH manual check with ResponsiveLayout
  (Lg: 35/65, Xl: 28/72 list/detail split)
- Add detail_visible field and 'i' toggle keybinding
- Gate wide split and stacked detail on detail_visible flag
- Mark unused layout constants as #[allow(dead_code)] since breakpoints
  now handle thresholds
- Flatten deeply nested wide-split rendering by using rl_split.rects

Archive browser (archive_browser.rs):
- Replace manual narrow/wide/medium percentage logic with ResponsiveLayout
  breakpoints (Md: 45/55, Lg: 40/60, Xl: 35/65 tree/preview split)
- Add detail_visible field gating preview panel and 'i' toggle
- Deduplicate filter bar rendering (was duplicated for narrow vs two-pane)
  into a single conditional block before the preview check
- Simplify splitter gap calculation using split.rects geometry

Attachments screen (attachments.rs):
- Add ResponsiveLayout (Lg: 55/45, Xl: 50/50 table/detail split)
- Extract render_table_content() for summary+header+table+bottom-detail+footer
- New render_side_detail() with structured key-value layout showing type,
  size, mode, SHA-1, dimensions, path, and provenance (message ID, sender,
  subject, thread, date, project)
- Add render_kv_lines() local helper with scroll support
- Bottom detail falls back when side panel is not available (narrow screens)

Contacts screen (contacts.rs):
- Add ResponsiveLayout (Lg: 55/45 text detail, Xl: 45/55 graph visualization)
- New render_contact_detail_panel() showing from/to agents, status with
  color coding (approved/blocked/pending), reason, project slugs,
  updated timestamp, and expiration
- On Xl breakpoint: render the graph visualization in the side panel
  instead of text detail when dimensions allow
- Add detail_visible, detail_scroll fields and 'i'/'J'/'K' keybindings
- Reset detail_scroll on selection change
- Add local render_kv_lines() with scroll indicator

Explorer screen (explorer.rs):
- Replace manual remaining_w >= 60 split with ResponsiveLayout
  (Lg: 50/50, Xl: 45/55 results/detail split)
- Add detail_visible field and 'i' toggle in ResultList focus
- Detail panel conditionally rendered based on rl_split.rects availability

Projects screen (projects.rs):
- Add ResponsiveLayout (Lg: 60/40, Xl: 50/50 table/detail split)
- New render_detail_panel() showing slug, path, activity status with
  icon/color, agent/message/reservation counts with theme colors,
  created time, and last activity relative time
- Extract render_table_content() helper
- Add format_relative_time() and local render_kv_lines()
- Add detail_visible, detail_scroll fields and 'i'/'J'/'K' keybindings

Reservations screen (reservations.rs):
- Add ResponsiveLayout (Lg: 55/45, Xl: 50/50) with modal-awareness
  (detail hidden when create form or preset dialog is active)
- New render_reservation_detail_panel() showing agent, pattern, project,
  exclusive flag with checkmark/cross icons, TTL left/total/ratio,
  granted timestamp, and active/expired/released status with color coding
- Add detail_visible, detail_scroll fields and 'i'/'J'/'K' keybindings
- Add local render_kv_lines() and #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)]

System health (system_health.rs):
- Add ResponsiveLayout (Lg: 55/45, Xl: 50/50 main/detail split)
- New render_anomaly_detail_panel() for Dashboard mode showing finding
  index, name, severity with color, detail text, remediation, and
  related HTTP path probes with status/latency
- New render_findings_panel() for Text mode showing severity-badged
  diagnostic lines with remediation hints
- Add detail_visible, detail_scroll, anomaly_cursor fields
- Add j/k navigation for anomaly selection, 'i' toggle, 'J'/'K' scroll
- Initialize new fields in test helper constructor

Threads screen (threads.rs):
- Replace manual THREAD_SPLIT_WIDTH_THRESHOLD check with ResponsiveLayout
  breakpoints (Md: 40/60, Lg: 34/66, Xl: 25/75 list/detail split)
- Add detail_visible field and 'i' toggle keybinding
- Gate stacked fallback on detail_visible
- Mark thread_list_width_percent and THREAD_WIDE_LIST_PERCENT as dead_code
  since breakpoints now handle width allocation

Tool metrics (tool_metrics.rs):
- Add ResponsiveLayout (Lg: 55/45, Xl: 50/50) for Table view mode
- New render_tool_detail_panel() showing tool name, calls, errors with
  color, error percentage, average latency, P50/P95/P99 percentiles,
  change points, conformal interval, trend sparkline, and recent latencies
- Extract build_tool_detail_lines() for testability
- Add detail_visible, detail_scroll fields and 'i'/'J'/'K' keybindings
- Add local render_kv_lines()

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
